name: lostmodesty-rebuild
description: লস্টমডেস্টি (Lost Modesty) blog rebuild — Next.js strangler-fig new app. Phase 0 scaffold.

scripts.test: node --test tests/redirect-audit.test.mjs tests/migration.test.mjs tests/parity.test.mjs tests/editor.test.mjs tests/activity.test.mjs tests/notifications.test.mjs
scripts.preflight: npm run tokens:contrast && npm run redirect:build && npm run redirect:audit

comment:devDependencies-deferred: Storybook, @storybook/*, playwright, lighthouse, @axe-core/* are M0/access-gated tooling — add at install time per scripts that need them (capture-baseline=playwright, cwv-baseline=lighthouse, storybook=design system). Kept out of the base manifest until their step runs, to keep the Phase 0 install light.
